testcase.name: setUp

error.message: EdgeDriver not found at: C:\Users\2389193\eclipse-workspace\test1\drivers\msedgedriver.exe Provide -DedgeDriverPath=... or place it at ./drivers/msedgedriver.exe (version must match Edge).

testcase.name: setUp

error.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 114 Current browser version is 142.0.7444.176 with binary path C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe Host info: host: 'LTIN640334', ip: '10.206.159.8' Build info: version: '4.40.0', revision: 'b3333f1' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--remote-allow-origins=*], extensions: []}}]}]
